name: Stable LM 2 1.6B
license: Stability AI Community License (non-commercial by default; commercial use requires Stability AI membership)
archDisplay: Dense decoder-only transformer (24 layers, LLaMA-style partial RoPE + LayerNorm, Arcade100k tokenizer)
note: Compact 7-language multilingual model (English, Spanish, German, Italian, French, Portuguese, Dutch) trained on 2T tokens over 2 epochs; smallest member of the StableLM 2 line.
